# vercel_kms_certificate (Resource)

Provides a self-signed X.509 certificate minted for a Vercel KMS issuer's active
signing key.

The certificate is generated when the resource is created and is not persisted
server-side, so it exists only in Terraform state. Changing any input — or the
`keepers` map — mints a fresh certificate with a new serial number.
Reading and deleting are no-ops, and this resource cannot be imported.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "vercel_kms_issuer" "example" {
  name = "my-issuer"
}

resource "vercel_kms_certificate" "example" {
  issuer_id = vercel_kms_issuer.example.id

  subject = {
    ou = "Engineering"
    c  = "US"
  }

  # Change any value in keepers to mint a fresh certificate.
  keepers = {
    minted_at = "2024-01-01"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `issuer_id` (String) The ID of the issuer to mint a certificate for.

### Optional

- `keepers` (Map of String) Arbitrary map of values that, when changed, mints a fresh certificate.
- `not_after` (String) The certificate validity end timestamp (RFC3339). Defaults to 12 months from creation. Changing this mints a fresh certificate.
- `not_before` (String) The certificate validity start timestamp (RFC3339). Defaults to the time of creation. Changing this mints a fresh certificate.
- `subject` (Attributes) The subject fields to include in the certificate. Changing this mints a fresh certificate. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subject))
- `team_id` (String) The ID of the team the issuer exists under. Required when configuring a team resource if a default team has not been set in the provider.

### Read-Only

- `certificate` (String) The PEM-encoded self-signed X.509 certificate.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for this resource, equal to the certificate serial number.
- `key_id` (String) The ID of the signing key the certificate was minted for.
- `kms_issuer_url` (String) The issuer URL embedded in the certificate.
- `serial_number` (String) The hexadecimal serial number of the certificate.

<a id="nestedatt--subject"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subject`

Optional:

- `c` (String) Two-letter country code.
- `l` (String) Locality.
- `ou` (String) Organizational unit.
- `st` (String) State or province.
